data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
proline oxidation to pyroglutamic acid/Tryptophan oxidation to oxolactone/aldehyde and ketone modifications
DST crosslinker cleaved by sodium periodate
Beta elimination of modified S or T followed by Michael addition of labelled DTT

project.title: Mass spectrometry analysis of SlLhcb2
project.projectDescription: Mass spectrometry analysis of the ΔLhcb2 protein after a 2-hour incubation with GNAT2.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Coincubation of the purified ΔGNAT2 (without signal peptide) and the N-terminal 50 amino acid domain of mature Lhcb2 protein (ΔLhcb2) for 2 hours, and theΔLhcb2 strips were separated by SDS-PAGE gel and thencut the band for mass spectrometry analysis.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Mascot version:2.7.0 Enzyme;Trypsin Maximum Missed Cleavages:2 Variable modifications:Acetyl (K),Oxidation (M)

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: College of Horticulture, China Agricultural University, Beijing, China
labPIs.name: Yang-Dong Guo

references.referenceLine: Wang X, Wu J, Li H, Liu Y, Han D, Dong D, Zhang J, Zhang L, Zhang N, Guo YD. Chloroplast acetyltransferase GNAT2 acts as a redox-regulated switch for state transitions in tomato. Mol Hortic. 2025 5(1):39

Characteristics[Label]: TMT 6 PLEX kit (Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc, Rockford, IL, USA, Batch: Lot#WE330299)
Comment[FractionationMethod]: fractionated by high pH reverse-phase HPLC using Thermo Betasil C18 column (5 μm particles, 10 mm ID, 250 mm length)
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: co-incubated with anti-acetyllysine antibody conjugated agarose beads (PTM BioLab, Inc., Hangzhou, China, Lot. PTM- 104) overnight to enrich the modified peptides.
